ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Continued To Aug-17-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearig for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 8/17/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-11-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents Oral Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for statement of damages and to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is also ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule his deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed by June 10, 2005. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 are to be paid on or before June 10, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2005 Continued To May-27-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
